existing_features.title: Create a visually striking landing page with an unconventional, modern design that breaks away from typical corporate aesthetics
Implement an interactive feature showcase section demonstrating dynamic content capabilities
Connect frontend to backend with React Query for seamless data fetching and mutations

Apply a bold, innovative design direction featuring warm coral and deep teal tones with geometric patterns and asymmetric layouts, creating a fresh aesthetic that emphasizes whitespace and modern typography

new_feature_requests.summary: Build a backend data model supporting user-generated content with basic CRUD operations
